command: focused Jest, API type-check, Prettier check, diff check, conflict scan, JSON/JSONL checks, and line-count check
summary: Focused ack/finish task-pull specs passed, API type-check passed, formatting/hygiene checks passed for parseable files, board JSON/JSONL parsed successfully, and production service files remain under 200 lines.
